title: Three PIOs found guilty of Canada couple's murder
summary_full: Three Indian-origin men have been convicted of first-degree murder in Canada for the killing of Arnold and Joanne De Jong in Abbotsford in May 2022. The court found Gurkaran Singh, Abhijeet Singh, and Khushveer Toor played an integral role in the murders, which prosecutors stated were jointly planned for robbery.
